title: Price Comparison 网购比价
scene: 朋友之间讨论网购比价经验

lines.speaker: Shopper
lines.line: I want to buy this laptop, but the price is different on every website.
lines.trans: 我想买这台笔记本电脑，但每个网站价格都不一样。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: Have you tried a price comparison app? It shows the best deal across stores.
lines.trans: 你用过比价APP吗？它能显示各个店铺的最优惠价格。

lines.speaker: Shopper
lines.line: Good idea. I checked three sites so far. Site A is cheapest, but the reviews are bad.
lines.trans: 好主意。到目前为止我查了三个网站。A网站最便宜，但评价很差。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: Do not just look at the price. Check the seller rating and return policy too.
lines.trans: 不要只看价格。也看看卖家评分和退货政策。

lines.speaker: Shopper
lines.line: You are right. Site B costs twenty dollars more, but the seller has five stars and free returns.
lines.trans: 你说得对。B网站贵二十美元，但卖家是五星，而且免费退货。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: Also check if there is a coupon code. Sometimes you can save another ten percent.
lines.trans: 再看看有没有优惠券。有时候还能再省百分之十。

lines.speaker: Shopper
lines.line: I found a code "SAVE10" on a discount website. Let me try it at checkout.
lines.trans: 我在一个折扣网站上找到了代码"SAVE10"。我结账时试试。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: Smart move. And use a cashback site if you can. You will get some money back later.
lines.trans: 聪明。如果可以的话，再用返利网站。之后还能拿回一些钱。

lines.speaker: Shopper
lines.line: The code worked! I saved thirty dollars in total. Thanks for the tips.
lines.trans: 优惠券有效！我一共省了三十美元。谢谢你的建议。
